title: IIM Jammu Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
org: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu) Teaching Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 01 May 2026 on the official website of IIM Jammu. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Jammu Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: IIM Jammu Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu) Teaching Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 01 May 2026 on the official website of IIM Jammu. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Jammu Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree preferably in Management with minimum 60% marks or equivalent grade and consistently good academic record, Proficient in MS Office
qualification.details: Master's degree preferably in Management with minimum 60% marks or equivalent grade and consistently good academic record. Proficient in MS Office. Minimum 2 years of relevant work experience preferred.

selection_process: Shortlisting Research Seminar Interview Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Jammu Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Jammu Teaching Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Teaching Assistant posts at IIM Jammu is 30th May 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for the Teaching Assistant (Contract) position at the Indian Institute of Management Jammu.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Teaching Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree preferably in Management with at least 60% marks or an equivalent grade, along with a consistently good academic record and proficiency in MS Office.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Teaching Assistant post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 40,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Teaching Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates, followed by a research seminar, an interview, and finally, the preparation of a merit list.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The Teaching Assistant position at IIM Jammu is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is advisable to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How should I apply for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIM Jammu or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section on or before the last date.
